content.en:
The extradimensional storm is terrifying, according to the data, as long as you don't really control the superdimensional power, you can't resist the extradimensional storm, and you will fall into the extradimensional storm in an instant.

But even if you master the power of the super dimension, if you don't condense the super dimensional Dao species, the strength will still not be able to survive in the super dimensional storm for too long.

Besides, even if you can really resist the extradimensional storm, you can't explore the Death Void, the speed is too slow, almost all of them are stuck in one place, and there is almost no point in exploring the Death Void.

And.

The extradimensional storm lasts for a long time, probably one or two extradimensional epochs, and among the extradimensional storms, within a dozen extradimensional epochs, resources are extremely scarce.

In other words, within dozens of extradimensional eras, this area is of little value, and the Galanbao ship is naturally not interested in coming here, at least after a hundred extradimensional eras, it will come again.

This is also the reason why the Garanbao ship has come here frequently in recent years, and it is also to make up for the losses in the future!

And Ye Tian's territory is the territory of 7,362, and there are several other territories nearby that are within the range of the extradimensional storm, and they will all be affected.

......

Soon, those peak realm gods who had purchased the extradimensional storm materials frowned one by one.

What they are worried about now is whether the extradimensional storm will have an impact on the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm, if they can't even bear the Eternal Realm and are destroyed by the extradimensional storm, then they will definitely die!

However, they soon purchased another piece of information from the Garanbao Ship, that is, there was nothing going on in the Eternal Realm, at most it would cause more cracks in the Eternal Realm, and a small amount of extradimensional storm power would be blown into the Eternal Realm.

As long as the formation is arranged in time to resist the escaping extradimensional storm, it will be fine.

As for what kind of formation can resist these escaping extra-dimensional storms, it is naturally a super-dimensional formation, and it needs to be arranged with the help of extra-dimensional things as the cornerstone of the formation.

And such a super-dimensional formation is of high value.

However, those supreme forces still took out a large amount of Gala Blue Treasure Coins to purchase a set of extradimensional formations.

Ye Tian also had no choice, he still had a human race to take refuge, and he had to buy a set of extra-dimensional formations.

So, he still spent 100,000 Galanbao coins to buy a very powerful extra-dimensional formation-Star Dimension Void Heaven Array!

This formation requires six extra-dimensional things as the foundation, once the arrangement is successful, the defense effect is very terrifying, and the resistance to the extra-dimensional storm is also very good, but it needs six peak realm gods to maintain the operation of the large array for a long time.

And really wait until the moment when the extradimensional storm comes, there should be no problem for the human race to gather the six peak realm gods, but it really can't be done, and his own six replica bodies are on it together, and the conditions are definitely met.

After a while, those supreme forces all purchased the extradimensional formation inheritance.

At this time, the Garanbao ship let these peak realm gods go down.

Whoa!!!

These realm gods and demon seeds left the Garlan treasure ship one after another, returning to the eternal realm and the demon seed abyss, and there was no conflict between the two sides.

The ship turned into a blue light and disappeared into the void of death.

The next time the Galanbo ship arrives, it will be a tenth of an extradimensional era.

......

Eternal borders.

Ye Tian is back.

This time, he was very satisfied with the transaction of the Garan Treasure Ship, not only buying the treasures he needed, but also increasing his knowledge.

Moreover, he had already refined the Super Secret Treasure Jialan Treasure Cloth, and he was not afraid of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace dealing with him.

However, he also had to be careful of other supreme forces.

In the one-tenth of the extradimensional era, the extradimensional storm will come, and those peak realm gods who have fused the extradimensional things will not be able to hold on to dozens of extradimensional epochs, they will definitely frantically collect extradimensional resources, and then buy ship quotas or staff quotas on the next Galanbao ship transaction.

And how to collect extradimensional resources frantically, if you collect them slowly, it will be too slow, and the best way is to snatch them.

And he is just a high-level peak realm god cultivator, and this time he has revealed a lot of wealth, maybe there is still a lot of wealth, and he will inevitably attract many peak realm gods.

However, now there is still a period of time before the next arrival of the Garan Treasure Ship, and the peak realm god among these supreme forces will definitely not act immediately, he still has time to prepare.

"I must raise my cultivation to the pinnacle of the realm god as soon as possible, once my cultivation breaks through, I won't be afraid of those supreme forces.~!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had several things to do in the years that followed.

The first is to arrange the Star Dimension Void Sky Array, this Extra-Dimensional Formation must be arranged, otherwise there will be no way to resist the dissipating power of the Super-Dimensional Storm in the future.

But whether it is arranging the Star Dimension Void Heaven Array or refining the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure, a lot of materials are required.

And Ye Tian still lacks some materials, and he has to get them together as soon as possible to facilitate refining.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian continued to explore the Death Void, striving to gather these extra-dimensional materials.

In this way, one era after another of the Solstices passed.

In the blink of an eye, tens of billions of years have passed. []

this day.

Ye Tian finally gathered the materials needed for one of the super secret treasures.

This super secret treasure is called the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield, and it has two forms, the first form can be turned into a pair of wings, making its own speed extremely fast, and the second form is to turn into a shield to protect the whole body, with an incomparably powerful defensive effect.

Of course, the Starwing Six-Arm Shield is still inferior to the defense effect and escape effect of the Garanbao Suit, and the two are not the same level as the Promise.

The Super Dimensional Secret Treasure is also divided into grades, according to the level, the Garan Treasure Clothes belong to the medium Super Dimensional Secret Treasure, and the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield is only a low-level Super Dimensional Secret Treasure.

But.

The Star Wing Six-Arm Shield was also helpful to Ye Tian, it could slightly increase his strength and life-saving ability, and he naturally wanted to refine it.

Soon.

Ye Tian began to refine the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield, he was very careful, and he had already understood the refining method of the Star Wing Six-Arm Shield, coupled with the deduction in advance, to ensure that there would be no mistakes in refining this time.

After all, he had only now gathered one of the materials for the Starwing Six-Armed Shield, and if he failed, he would have to continue to collect the few materials he lacked, and it would take a lot of time to gather the next one.

Fortunately, he was very lucky, and after a long period of refining, the Star Wings Six-Arm Shield was finally refined by him.
